case_title: BMW OF SAN FRANCISCO VS RUSSELL, CHRISTINA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $410.04 FILED BY BMW OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT RUSSELL, CHRISTINA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-24-1996 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT C
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT TO RUSSELL CHRISTINA RETURNED ATTEMPTED NOT KNOWN.
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT RUSSELL, CHRISTINA

NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF HEARING TO CHRISTINA RUSSELL RETURNED NO LONGER LIVING HERE.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BMW OF SAN FRANCISCO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RUSSELL, CHRISTINA $410.04 PRINCIPAL, $55.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $465.04 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAY-24-1996, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUN-18-1996 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C
